hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
tier_file="/tmp/agent-forge-tier"
tier=$(cat "$tier_file" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
if [ "$tier" != "micro" ]; then
  qr_done=$(cat /tmp/agent-forge-qr-done 2>/dev/null || echo "no")
  if [ "$qr_done" != "yes" ]; then
    echo '[agent-forge] QR gate not executed. Run /qr-gate before committing (Micro tier excluded).' >&2
  fi
fi
echo "$input"

#!/bin/bash
echo '[agent-forge] Session ending. Checklist:' >&2
echo '  - delta-log recorded? (delta-logs/M{N}-{slug}.json)' >&2
echo '  - rolling-summary updated? (delta-logs/rolling-summary.md)' >&2
echo '  - token metrics collected? (token_session_export)' >&2
rm -f /tmp/agent-forge-tier /tmp/agent-forge-qr-done 2>/dev/null
